landing.sub: Snap any receipt — any language, any currency. AI reads vendor, total, and line items without a single keystroke.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to track spending
landing.f1Body: Claude AI reads any receipt — vendor, total, tax, line items — without you typing a single character.
landing.f2Body: USD, EUR, GBP, KRW, CAD, GHS, NGN. Currency is auto-detected from the receipt image.
landing.f3Body: English, Korean, German. Switch the interface language instantly from Settings.
landing.f4Body: Set a monthly limit. A live progress bar tracks every new receipt against your goal.
landing.f5Body: Category donut and 30-day bar chart, updated the moment you scan a receipt.
landing.f6Body: Drop up to 20 receipts at once. AI extracts them all simultaneously — up to 3 in parallel.
landing.how1Body: Photograph or upload any receipt — JPEG, PNG, WebP, or HEIC.
landing.how2Body: AI reads vendor, amount, currency, and line items in seconds.
landing.how3Body: Spending charts and budgets update instantly. Export to CSV any time.
landing.trustSub: Privacy is not a feature — it is a default.
landing.trust1Body: Your uploaded receipts are never shared, indexed, or sold. Only you can see your data.
landing.trust2Body: Revenue comes from subscriptions, not your financial history.
landing.trust3Body: Remove individual receipts or your entire account with one tap. Nothing is retained.
landing.trust4Body: Authentication follows industry-standard security practices. Passwords are never stored in plain text.
landing.ctaSub: Free to get started. No credit card required.

dashboard.title: This month
dashboard.noDataSub: Scan your first receipt and spending insights will appear here.

upload.title: Add a receipt
upload.subtitle: Take a photo or upload an image
upload.dropzone: Click or drag a receipt photo here
upload.supportedFormats: JPG, PNG, WebP, or HEIC, up to 10MB
upload.extractingDetail: Claude AI is extracting vendor, items, and totals
upload.success: Got it! Saved to your receipts.
upload.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
upload.errorWrongType: Only JPG, PNG, WebP, or HEIC are supported.

settings.title: Settings
settings.currencyNote: Used as the default for new receipts. Change per receipt in the edit form.
settings.budgetNote: Set a spending target — visible on your dashboard.
settings.exportNote: Includes all extracted receipts with line items.
